objective: Cycle 95 — C125: mg_ombres live display aligned with score formula (collision penalty)

bugs_fixed: C125/OMB-FORMULA-01 (HIGH): mg_ombres live status showed maxProgress*100 (e.g. 85%) but final score applied collision penalty — gap up to 70pts. Player who wall-hugged throughout could see 'Progression: 85%' then receive score ~12. Fix: live display now computes estScore = maxProgress*100*(1-livePenalty*0.85) where livePenalty=collisionTime/totalTime — same formula as endGame(). Shows 'Score: ~N%' or 'COLLISION ! Score: ~N%'. C124-02 from playtester. Third formula-alignment fix (after SF-HUD-01/C121 and VOL-FORMULA-01/C124).
audit_summary.c125_verdict: CLEAR — Ombres display formula aligned. All 3 display/score divergences now fixed (sang_froid, volonte, ombres). 0 TS errors.
